nodes.label: AI as idea generator and organizer
nodes.grounding_span: I'll just type in stuff I need to get done and AI will help organize it in a list or suggest other tasks

nodes.label: AI as motivational and anxiety-reducing companion
nodes.grounding_span: It can help me ease anxiety, or just having a discussion with another 'person' about what I need to do

nodes.label: AI as judgment-free explainer of fundamental concepts
nodes.label_negative: Human judgment and fear of asking stupid questions
nodes.grounding_span: since it's not a human being, I felt more comfortable asking questions that might seem 'stupid'

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Hopefully I can have more confidence in its answers (especially in regards to tax law) in the future and not have to spend so much time double checking

nodes.label: AI as confidence-building assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I almost always talk to AI about things before doing them, it helps me feel more self-confident

nodes.label: Productivity and efficient task completion
nodes.grounding_span: AI will help organize it in a list or suggest other tasks

nodes.label: Emotional well-being and reduced stress
nodes.grounding_span: It can help me ease anxiety

nodes.label: Understanding and knowledge acquisition
nodes.grounding_span: I felt more comfortable asking questions that might seem 'stupid'

nodes.label: Professional confidence and validation
nodes.grounding_span: Working with AI has really helped improve my personal confidence with my work

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: It was a very satisfying and productive experience overall

nodes.label: Cautious skepticism toward AI reliability
nodes.grounding_span: Hopefully I can have more confidence in its answers (especially in regards to tax law) in the future

nodes.label: Confidence in AI as a key skill
nodes.grounding_span: I almost always talk to AI about things before doing them, it helps me feel more self-confident

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through conversation
nodes.grounding_span: My prompts usually are some kind of follow up from the information the AI gives me in its previous response

nodes.label: Proactive skill maintenance through secondary AI job and online discourse
nodes.grounding_span: I have a second job working directly with AI so that really helps maintain my skills
